error.invalid_url: Please enter a valid absolute URL (e.g., http://192.168.1.50:8080)

data_description.url: The full base URL of your Gatus status page instance including protocol and port.

user.description: Enter the network details for your Gatus status page instance. Make sure to include the protocol (e.g., `http://` or `https://`) and the port number if you are not using a standard port.
